title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google AI Studio is a browser-based platform that lets users build custom apps directly from mobile devices using voice commands. The tutorial shows building an image-generation app without installing software, using Gemini to generate code in real time and the Nano Banana API for image functionality.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrates building a custom app entirely from a mobile device using Google AI Studio, a browser-based platform that requires no software installation. The workflow relies on voice commands to drive Gemini, which generates the app's code in real time. The example builds an image-generation app, with image functionality supplied through the Nano Banana API.
